title: Data Explorer
description: The Data Explorer enables researchers to interactively query, profile, and assess the quality of data within connected sources. It includes a Data Quality Dashboard for reviewing DQD results, allowing teams to understand data completeness, conformance, and plausibility before conducting analyses.
tips: Run data quality checks on a new data source before building cohort definitions to identify potential gaps in coverage or coding inconsistencies.
Use the Data Quality Dashboard to compare quality metrics across multiple data sources when selecting populations for network studies.
Filter data quality results by domain to focus remediation efforts on the clinical areas most relevant to your study.
Document data quality findings and share them with data stewards to support upstream ETL improvements.
Revisit Data Quality Dashboard results after each data refresh to track improvements or regressions over time.
